case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DARCY ROGERIO DA SILVA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED APR-12-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DA SILVA, DARCY ROGERIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DA SILVA, DARCY ROGERIO $2,063.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,163.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DA SILVA, DARCY ROGERIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DARCY ROGERIO DA SILVA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DA SILVA, DARCY ROGERIO
